case_title: BEALE, PAX FOR PREGNANCY CONSULTATION CTR, A CORP. VS SUNSET SCAVENGER'S CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,238.32 FILED BY BEALE, PAX FOR PREGNANCY CONSULTATION CTR, A CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER'S CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO SUNSET SCAVENGER RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEALE, PAX FOR PREGNANCY CONSULTATION CTR, A CORP. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER'S CORP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
